title: hieracium schmidtii subsp. dinglerianum
intro: Hieracium schmidtii subsp. dinglerianum, also known as a subspecies of the Hieracium schmidtii plant, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Hieracium schmidtii subsp. dinglerianum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, have been used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
